nasb.text: Because you push with side and with shoulder, and thrust at all the weak with your horns until you have scattered them abroad,

esv.text: Because you push with side and shoulder, and thrust at all the weak with your horns, till you have scattered them abroad,

cnv.text: 因為你們用腰用肩擁擠所有瘦弱的，又用角牴觸牠們，直到把牠們驅散到外面，

ccb.text: 你们肥羊用胁和肩拱，用角抵瘦弱的，使他们四散。
